_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Prepare database design and architecture reports.
reference_document_element_description: Design and document the enterprise data architecture, including platform topology, data domain structure, integration patterns, and data lifecycle policies.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-T-002 (DA, cosine: 0.556), AI-T-013 (AI, cosine: 0.543).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.5/10 (raw 0.645). Shared vocabulary: [architecture, design]. DCWF-only terms [database, prepare, reports] vs WIDAI-only terms [data, document, domain, enterprise, integration, lifecycle] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.887 (P=0.909, R=0.867). P exceeds R by 0.042 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Prepare database design and architecture reports." and "Design and document the enterprise data architecture, including platform topolog" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.572 < STS 0.645 (gap -0.073). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [database, prepare, reports] and [data, document, domain] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.8%. Shared tokens: [architecture, design]. DCWF-only: [database, prepare, reports]. WIDAI-only: [data, document, domain, enterprise, integration, lifecycle].
